# Indikator Mutu App

A full-stack monorepo application for managing and monitoring "Indikator Mutu" (Quality Indicators) in a healthcare context.

## Tech Stack

### Frontend (@repo/frontend)
- **Framework**: React 19 + Vite
- **Routing**: [TanStack Router](https://tanstack.com/router) (Type-safe routing)
- **Data Fetching**: [TanStack Query](https://tanstack.com/query)
- **Tables**: [TanStack Table](https://tanstack.com/table)
- **Forms**: [TanStack Form](https://tanstack.com/form)
- **UI Components**: [Material UI](https://mui.com)
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS v4 + Emotion (MUI Engine)
- **State Management**: [Zustand](https://zustand-demo.pmnd.rs/)

### Backend (@repo/backend)
- **Framework**: [Hono](https://hono.dev/) (running on Node.js)
- **ORM**: [Prisma](https://www.prisma.io/)
- **Database**: MariaDB
- **Validation**: [Zod](https://zod.dev/)
- **Auth**: JWT (jsonwebtoken) + bcrypt

### Shared (@repo/resource)
- Shared types, constants, and utilities used by both frontend and backend.

## Project Structure

- `apps/frontend/`: React application using TanStack ecosystem.
- `apps/backend/`: Hono API with Prisma ORM.
- `packages/resource/`: Shared library for types and logic.
- `docker-compose.yml`: Local development environment (MariaDB).

## Key Routes & Modules

### Frontend Routes (`apps/frontend/src/routes/`)
- `/login`: User authentication.
- `/dashboard`: Overview of quality indicators.
- `/master`: Management of items, users, and categories.
- `/tugas`: Activity and task management.
- `/laporan`: Reporting and visualization.

### Backend Routes (`apps/backend/src/routes/`)
- `auth.ts`: Authentication endpoints.
- `activities.ts`: Quality indicator activity management.
- `items.ts`: Master data for indicator items.
- `categories.ts`: Category management.
- `laporan.ts`: Reporting logic.

## Development

### Common Commands
- `pnpm dev`: Start all services in development mode.
- `pnpm build`: Build all applications for production.
- `pnpm -C apps/backend db:push`: Sync Prisma schema with database.
- `pnpm -C apps/backend db:generate`: Generate Prisma client.
